metadata.notes: All runs performed with temperature=0 for determinism. Latency measured end-to-end including all 4 LLM calls.

real_prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, deal pipeline, role-based access (admin, sales), and analytics dashboard. Premium plan with Stripe.
SaaS billing platform with free/pro/enterprise plans, usage metering, invoicing, and admin account management.
Job board where companies post jobs, candidates apply with resumes, admins moderate. Include applicant tracking and email notifications.
E-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, orders, inventory management dashboard, discount codes, and Stripe checkout.
Healthcare patient portal with appointment booking, medical records, prescription tracking, doctor messaging, and billing.
Online learning platform with courses, video lessons, quizzes, certificates, instructor dashboard, and subscription billing.
Project management tool like Jira with boards, tickets, sprints, team roles, time tracking, and integrations with GitHub and Slack.
Restaurant ordering system with menu management, table reservations, online orders, kitchen display, and payment processing.
Real estate listing platform with property search, agent profiles, virtual tours, lead management, and mortgage calculator.
Social media analytics dashboard that tracks engagement, follower growth, post performance, and competitor analysis across Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn.

ambiguity_warnings: Prompt is very short — key features may be missing.
No auth/user system mentioned — assuming basic single-user auth.
No UI pages mentioned — will infer standard pages from features.
result.handling: System made reasonable assumptions (generic CRUD app), documented in assumptions array.

ambiguity_warnings: Prompt is very short — key features may be missing.
result.handling: Intent stage inferred ride-hailing model, documented 4 assumptions about differentiation.

edge_cases.prompt: Build a free app that makes money. No ads, no subscriptions, no payments.

ambiguity_warnings: Conflicting monetization signals: 'free' + revenue terms detected.
result.handling: Conflict resolved: assumed freemium with data monetization model. Documented in assumptions.

edge_cases.prompt: Everyone is an admin. There are no permissions. But only admins can see the admin panel.

ambiguity_warnings: Conflicting role definition: everyone is admin AND only admins have access.
result.handling: Role conflict resolved pragmatically: all users get admin role, access control applied to admin panel route.

ambiguity_warnings: Prompt is very short — key features may be missing.
result.handling: Expanded to full CRM with reasonable defaults: auth, CRUD, basic dashboard.

ambiguity_warnings: Prompt is very short — key features may be missing.
No auth/user system mentioned — assuming basic single-user auth.
result.handling: No parent app context. Assumed generic web app, generated analytics module as standalone.

edge_cases.prompt: Build an app with 47 pages, AES-256 encryption, phone+email+government ID verification, and <100ms homepage.

result.handling: Impractical constraints noted in assumptions. Generated reasonable subset. <100ms constraint documented as infrastructure concern outside schema scope.

edge_cases.prompt: Users can be admins or not admins. Admins can do everything. Regular users can do some things.

result.handling: Standard 2-role RBAC generated. Assumed regular users get read + own-resource-write permissions.

edge_cases.prompt: Build a real-time chat app with no WebSockets and no polling. Must be instant.

ambiguity_warnings: Real-time requirement conflicts with stated technical constraints.
result.handling: Conflict documented. Schema generated with SSE (Server-Sent Events) as resolution — satisfies real-time without WebSocket/polling.

edge_cases.prompt: Build a platform that is simultaneously a hospital management system, a stock trading platform, a social network, and a video streaming service.

result.handling: All four domains scaffolded. High repair count due to JSON size. Suggested decomposing into microservices in assumptions.
